heading: Omitted

notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to acquisition of lands for the benefit of individual tribes on the Wind River Reservation, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 103–435, § 15108 Stat. 4573Nov. 2, 1994
